account_reference_description: Save this account and it will be selected in the transaction form
account_restore_description: Restore this account and select it here
category_reference_description: Save this category and it will be selected in the transaction form
category_restore_description: Restore this category and use it here
delete_description: This action cannot be undone. The transaction will be permanently removed
empty_date_range_description: Clear the current filters or adjust {filter} in the header to bring results back
empty_date_range_title: No transactions in this date range
empty_description: Add your first income, expense, or transfer to start building a reliable activity history
empty_filtered_description: Clear the current filters or adjust the date range to bring results back
empty_header_description: Clear the current filters or adjust the header date range to bring results back
error_destination_different: Pick two different accounts for a transfer
error_no_account: Add at least one account before recording a transaction
error_no_category: Create at least one category in Transactions before saving this transaction
filter_description: Refine the transaction list without leaving the dashboard
form_create_category_hint: You can create a category directly from the category field if you need a new one
form_description: Keep amounts positive. The transaction type decides whether it adds money, spends money, or moves money between your accounts
prerequisite_description: Transactions need an account because every movement starts from somewhere real
prerequisite_title: Add an account before recording transactions
